subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the Glory of God, the Mighty, the All-Knowing, and His peace throughout the nights and days, O Niyáz Effendi [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ع ل علیک بهاء الله العزیز العلام و سلامه فی اللیالی و الایام جناب نیاز افندی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity, @justice and mercy, @prayer for protection, @prayer for prosperity
